entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Pennisetum glaucum (L.) R. Br., the crop evaluated for drought response

entities.name: DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: The stress condition used to evaluate the response of pearl millet landraces

entities.name: OPTIMUM CONDITIONS
entities.description: Non-stress conditions used as a control for evaluation

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of pearl millet landraces to maintain productivity under drought stress

entities.name: DROUGHT ESCAPE
entities.description: The ability of pearl millet landraces to avoid drought stress

entities.name: FLOWERING TIME
entities.description: The duration until the plant reaches the flowering stage

entities.name: YIELDING ABILITY
entities.description: The capacity of the landraces to produce grain under various conditions

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The total amount of grain produced by the plant

entities.name: DROUGHT RESPONSE INDEX
entities.description: A metric used to quantify the variation in grain yield under stress conditions

entities.name: PANICLE NUMBER
entities.description: The number of panicles produced per plant

entities.name: BIOMASS ACCUMULATION
entities.description: The total biological mass produced by the plant

entities.name: INDIVIDUAL GRAIN MASS
entities.description: The mass of a single grain

entities.name: GRAIN NUMBER PER PANICLE
entities.description: The number of grains per panicle

entities.name: HARVEST INDEX
entities.description: The ratio of grain yield to total biomass

entities.name: LANDRACES
entities.description: Local varieties of pearl millet used as a germplasm source for adaptation

relationships.description: target trait for improving under stress
